title: Hypothesis in the past
subtitle: Use si hubiera..., habría... for unreal past.
overview: B2 needs unreal past conditions for reflection and regret.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: Si hubiera salido antes, habría llegado a tiempo.
If I had left earlier, I would have arrived on time.
Si lo hubiera sabido, te habría avisado.
If I had known it, I would have warned you.
It would have been better to book.

items.es: Si hubiera revisado la fecha, no habría comprado el billete equivocado.
items.en: If I had checked the date, I would not have bought the wrong ticket.

items.es: Si lo hubiera sabido antes, habría cambiado el plan.
items.en: If I had known it earlier, I would have changed the plan.

items.es: Habría sido mejor hablar con calma desde el principio.
items.en: It would have been better to speak calmly from the beginning.

items.es: Si hubiéramos reservado, no habríamos esperado tanto.
items.en: If we had booked, we would not have waited so long.

items.es: La experiencia habría sido menos estresante con más preparación.
items.en: The experience would have been less stressful with more preparation.
